name: Pecan Tassies
recipeInstructions:
Combine first 6 ingredients; mix until blended. Spoon mixture into tart shells, filling three-fourths full. Bake at 350 degrees for 20 minutes or until browned. Dust with powdered sugar before serving, if desired.
Yield: 2 dozen TART SHELLS
Combine all ingredients; stir until blended. Shape dough into 24 balls; chill. Place in greased 1-3/4-inch tart pans, shaping each ball into a shell.
Yield: 2 dozen
